actions.expression:
SELECT khsheet3.kh_id,khsheet3.company_name
FROM khsheet3
WHERE   ((khsheet3.ywry=:_user_username_)
   or  (khsheet3.zjl=:_user_username_)
   or  (khsheet3.wxzj=:_user_username_)) and (khsheet3.module1="客户资料")

       cght.khmc

       cghtsheet.zje,
       cghtsheet.zwpm,
       cghtsheet.bjhh,
       cghtsheet.khhh
FROM cght,cghtsheet 
WHERE (cght.rid=cghtsheet.pid) 
  AND (cght.hthm=[工厂索赔.赔款明细.采购合同]) 
  AND (cghtsheet.cpbh=[工厂索赔.赔款明细.产品编号]) 
  AND permission('采购合同') 
ORDER BY cghtsheet.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT khspsheet1.sid,
       khspsheet1.cght,
       khspsheet1.cpbh,
       khspsheet1.zyhh,
       khspsheet1.khhh,
       khspsheet1.pkje,
       khspsheet1.gcpk,
       khspsheet1.zwpm,
       khspsheet1.cgry,
       khspsheet1.ywry,
       khspsheet1.gdry,
       khspsheet1.yhry,
       khspsheet1.jzry,
       khspsheet1.jcdz,
       khspsheet1.zdry,
       khspsheet1.dzry,
       khspsheet1.wyzd
FROM khsp,khspsheet1 
WHERE (khsp.rid=khspsheet1.pid) 
  AND (khsp.ajbh=[工厂索赔.案件编号]) 
  AND permission('客户索赔') 
ORDER BY khspsheet1.sid ASC

actions.name: 计算-采购金额
actions.caption: 计算-采购金额
actions.expression: [工厂索赔.赔款明细.合同金额]

actions.name: 计算-赔款金额
actions.caption: 计算-赔款金额
actions.expression: [工厂索赔.赔款明细.赔款金额]

actions.name: 计算-索赔金额
actions.caption: 计算-索赔金额
actions.expression: [工厂索赔.赔款明细.工厂赔款]

actions.name: 计算-实际赔付
actions.caption: 计算-实际赔付
actions.expression: [工厂索赔.赔款明细.工厂赔款]

actions.name: 计算-赔款合计
actions.caption: 计算-赔款合计
actions.expression: [工厂索赔.现金赔款]+[工厂索赔.实际赔付]

actions.name: 计算-剩余金额
actions.caption: 计算-剩余金额
actions.expression: [工厂索赔.索赔金额]-[工厂索赔.赔款合计]

actions.name: 计算-赔款合计2
actions.caption: 计算-赔款合计2
actions.expression: [工厂索赔.扣款详情.金    额]

actions.name: 计算-赔款明细-赔款金额
actions.caption: 计算-赔款明细-赔款金额
actions.expression: [工厂索赔.赔款明细.外销赔款]*[工厂索赔.赔款明细.利  率]
actions.output: 工厂索赔.赔款明细.赔款金额

actions.name: 计算-扣款详情-金    额
actions.caption: 计算-扣款详情-金    额
actions.expression: ([工厂索赔.扣款详情.原 单 价]-[工厂索赔.扣款详情.赔款单价])*[工厂索赔.扣款详情.合同数量]
actions.output: 工厂索赔.扣款详情.金    额

actions.name: 计算-赔款明细.赔款金额
actions.caption: 计算-赔款明细.赔款金额
actions.expression: [工厂索赔.赔款明细.外销赔款]*[工厂索赔.赔款明细.利  率]
actions.output: 工厂索赔.赔款明细.赔款金额

actions.name: 调入赔款明细部门

fields.output: 工厂索赔.赔款明细.外销部门
fields.caption: 外销部门

actions.expression:
select bm from ywrybiao 
where yhm=[工厂索赔.赔款明细.业务人员]
actions.caption: 调入赔款明细部门

view.params:
SELECT DISTINCT(khsheet3.company_name)
FROM khsheet3
WHERE   ((khsheet3.ywry=:_user_username_)
   or  (khsheet3.zjl=:_user_username_)
   or  (khsheet3.wxzj=:_user_username_)) and (khsheet3.module1="客户资料")

SELECT khsp.ajbh
FROM khsp
ORDER BY khsp.ajbh desc

SELECT hbdm.hbdm
FROM hbdm
ORDER BY hbdm.SID ASC

已赔付
已辙销
可损

SELECT ywrybiao.bmjl
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.yhm=:yhm)
ORDER BY ywrybiao.SID ASC

SELECT DISTINCT(cymxsheet.fphm)
FROM cymxsheet
WHERE   (cymxsheet.gcmc=[工厂索赔.生产厂家])
   AND  (cymxsheet.fpsb1="是")
   AND  (cymxsheet.sjcy>="2019-12-15")
ORDER BY cymxsheet.SID ASC

SELECT cght.hthm
FROM cght
WHERE  permission('采购合同')
ORDER BY cght.SID ASC
limit 5000

view.params:
SELECT hbdm.hhl
FROM hbdm
ORDER BY hbdm.SID ASC

SELECT cght.hthm
FROM cght
WHERE  permission('采购合同')
ORDER BY cght.SID ASC
limit 5000
